verdict_summary: Full character.ai session captured (21.6 MB HAR, 319 entries, WS s2c add_turn envelope confirmed). PII reply silently dropped after greeting — backend filter suspected. Warning bubble dispatch schema identified: command='add_turn' with turn.candidates[].raw_content as message body.

key_findings.backend_filter_observation: After PII prompt submit, only initial greeting add_turn (state=STATE_OK, is_final=true) was received. No further turn for the PII response in the 90+ second window — backend silently dropped the reply (chat UI stuck at typing dots). Frontend dispatcher consumed both add_turn frames without filtering.

notes: Ground-truth HAR for v2.2.4 phase 6 unblock. Envelope shape confirmed; warning bubble injection must produce a fresh add_turn frame with the same turn_key.chat_id (from c2s create_and_generate_turn) and a new turn_id+candidate_id, with raw_content set to the warning text. The dispatcher does NOT silently drop add_turn frames — they are rendered as chat bubbles. HAR contains every required field for envelope cloning.
